since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +3.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.13% · BTC +0.69% · Gold -0.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.66%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +3.05%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +3.05%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +5.86%, AAPL +3.64%, TTD +3.64%, META +3.53%. Laggards: DELL -11.68%, MU -8.03%, AMBA -7.38%, ANET -7.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.19% at $135.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
